description_long: This is a three-seater sofa upholstered in medium brown leather with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The seat and backrest are divided into three distinct, generously padded sections, each featuring deep button tufting for added texture and visual interest. The armrests are wide, padded, and slightly angled, with matching button details on the top surface. The sofa's legs are short and blocky, integrated into the side panels for a sturdy, grounded appearance. The back of the sofa is flat and unadorned, with subtle vertical seam lines. Overall, the design is modern yet classic, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A medium brown leather three-seater sofa with deep button tufting, wide padded armrests, and a modern, sturdy silhouette. The upholstery is smooth and slightly glossy, with distinct seat and back sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing three individual, tufted seat and back cushions, wide padded armrests, and the full seating area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back with vertical seam lines and the integrated block-style legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest, cushion thickness, and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, attached seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all with deep button tufting and uniform size.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests at each end, straight profile, slightly above seat height, with button tufting detail on the top surface.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs integrated into the side panels at each corner, visually recessed and covered in matching upholstery.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest segmented into three sections, each with deep button tufting and attached cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown leather with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and deep button tufting on all cushions.
